title: PMMA Spin-coating
author: Kenneth Schackart
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yaefsbe

steps.title: Wipe cover slip with 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Wipe cover slip with 70% ethanol using a delicate task wipe.

steps.title: Place cove slip into spin coater,...
steps.instruction: Place cove slip into spin coater, centering with the square in the spin coater.

steps.title: Dispense 30 µL PMMA solution onto...
steps.instruction: Dispense 30 µL PMMA solution onto the center of the cover slip.

steps.title: Spin for 00:00:30 at 2000 rpm
steps.instruction: Spin for 00:00:30 at 2000 rpm. This step can be varied, where higher angular velocities will form thinner coatings.

steps.title: Carefully remove cover slip from spin coater using tweezers
steps.instruction: Carefully remove cover slip from spin coater using tweezers.

steps.title: Place cover slip onto 180 °C hot plate for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Place cover slip onto 180 °C hot plate for 00:01:00 .
